topic: make a 2x2 grid prompt using skill attahced
summary: A 2x2 grid prompt was requested by the Director, which the Assistant generated for the PixVerse CLI using the "Codex 2x2 grid images generation cinematic prompt for Pixverse" skill. The prompt is designed to capture comical distress and dynamic action for a "hilarious scene." `merchants in a line before the gate.jpg` was specified as `@image1`, serving as the foundational environment for 100% unchanged architecture, lighting, and scale, also setting the visual style for the general merchant population. Since `scroll.png` was not attached, its description was integrated directly into the prompt details. `@image2` (Beduin merchant full size) was designated to inform the style and attire of other merchants, specifically an indigo-robed Beduin, with `@image3` also designated for guards. The prompt follows a strict format, emphasizing a "premium luminous 3D animated feature-film" aesthetic with true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, and a high-quality 4K animated movie look.
